name: ProTee at 49th St
about: ProTee at 49th St is an indoor golf simulator venue in Marion, IA, featuring ProTee play technology and Gameday software across multiple simulator bays. The facility offers a casual, welcoming environment for players of all skill levels, from serious golfers and practice enthusiasts to families and groups seeking a fun social outing. Pricing is bay-based with hourly rates, and the venue is also home to adult and junior golf leagues, weekly cornhole tournaments, and is available for private event rentals with food service.
why_golfers_like_it: Multiple simulator bays with flexible booking options
Availability of both right and left-handed swing bays
Host to structured adult and junior leagues with online tracking
Social atmosphere with food, drinks, and weekly cornhole tournaments
Option to rent the entire space for private parties and corporate events

food_and_drink.notes: Air-fried bar favorites made fresh, perfect for sharing
Full bar service available; free drink chip included with league play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, please bring your own clean clubs to enjoy the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drink?
faq.answer: Outside food and drink are not mentioned, but the venue offers its own air-fried bar favorites and a full bar for purchase.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The content does not specify a standard duration for an 18-hole round.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, ProTee at 49th St offers a dedicated junior league for players in grades 7-12 and is generally open to families.
